grammar_points.student_explanation: always/usually/often/sometimes/never 表示做事的频率，放在动词前面
grammar_points.teacher_explanation: always/usually/often/sometimes/never 表示做事的频率，放在动词前面

correct_examples.sentence: I sweep the floor every day.
She washes the dishes after dinner.

wrong_examples.correction: I sweep the floor every day.

wrong_examples.sentence: She washs the dishes after dinner.
wrong_examples.correction: She washes the dishes after dinner.
